scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:typeorm
scripts.test:core: cross-env AUTH_RATELIMIT_MAX=100000 PORT=2231 NODE_ENV=memory BROWSER=false JWT_SECRET=tEst0nly_k7Qx2mNp9vLrT4wYbE6sH1jD8fG3aZ5c JWT_REFRESH_SECRET=tEst0nly_R3frsh9vLrT4wYbE6sH1jD8fG3aZ5cK7 mocha --import=tsx ./test/index.spec.ts -t 100000 --exit
scripts.test:perf: cross-env PORT=2233 NODE_ENV=memory LOG_LEVEL=error LOG_FASTIFY=false MFA_DB_SECRET=unit-test-secret-please-change-32xyz mocha --import=tsx ./test/perf/**/*.spec.ts -t 120000 --exit
scripts.test:e2e:pglite: cross-env AUTH_RATELIMIT_MAX=100000 PORT=2234 NODE_ENV=memory LOG_LEVEL=silent JWT_SECRET=e2e-test-secret-please-change-32-chars MFA_DB_SECRET=unit-test-secret-please-change-32xyz mocha --import=tsx ./test/e2e/**/*.e2e.spec.ts -t 60000 --exit

scripts.test:e2e:norefresh:pglite: cross-env AUTH_RATELIMIT_MAX=100000 PORT=2237 NODE_ENV=memory LOG_LEVEL=silent JWT_REFRESH=false JWT_SECRET=e2e-test-secret-please-change-32-chars MFA_DB_SECRET=unit-test-secret-please-change-32xyz mocha --import=tsx ./test/e2e-norefresh/**/*.e2e.spec.ts -t 60000 --exit
scripts.test:e2e:mfa:pglite: cross-env AUTH_RATELIMIT_MAX=100000 PORT=2238 NODE_ENV=memory LOG_LEVEL=silent JWT_SECRET=e2e-test-secret-please-change-32-chars MFA_DB_SECRET=unit-test-secret-please-change-32xyz mocha --import=tsx ./test/e2e-mfa/**/*.e2e.spec.ts -t 60000 --exit
scripts.test:e2e:ratelimit:pglite: cross-env AUTH_RATELIMIT_MAX=3 AUTH_RATELIMIT_WINDOW=60000 PORT=2239 NODE_ENV=memory LOG_LEVEL=silent JWT_SECRET=e2e-test-secret-please-change-32-chars MFA_DB_SECRET=unit-test-secret-please-change-32xyz mocha --import=tsx ./test/e2e-ratelimit/**/*.e2e.spec.ts -t 60000 --exit

scripts.reset: npm install && npm update && npm run build
scripts.check-all: npm run lint && npm run type-check && npm run depcruise
